one_line_positioning: P&L-driven Senior Merchandiser scaling womenswear categories from zero and lifting margins 13 percentage points, ready to drive the women's jersey business at H&M India.
narrative_angle: A NIFT-trained merchandiser who built a fashion category from near zero to ₹3.5 lakh revenue in two months while improving margins from 22% to 35% through vendor negotiation—bringing commercial acumen and multi-supplier coordination across India and Asia. While jersey-specific experience is developing, a proven record of launching new categories and rapid P&L ownership shows readiness to master the category fast.
lead_strengths: Built fashion category from near zero, generating ₹3.5 lakh revenue in two months at SuperK.
Improved product margins from 22% to 35% through vendor negotiation and pricing strategy.
Managed PO/PI coordination for 20+ suppliers across India and Asia, achieving 95% on-time delivery at Go Colors.
proof_points_to_emphasize: Expanded fashion assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories
Negotiated vendor pricing, improving margins from 22% to 35%
Managed PO/PI coordination for 20+ suppliers and 10+ factories
Reduced stock-outs by ~20% across priority products
Launched 3+ sub-categories at Go Colors, boosting sales
things_to_downplay: Limited exposure to SAP or similar ERP systems
Jersey/casualwear expertise: experience is more in bottom-wear and accessories, not pure jersey
Omnichannel experience is indirect, not explicitly led across offline and online
tone_guidance: Lead with commercial impact and vendor relationships. Use retail terminology (sell-through, margin, OTB cautiously). Frame lack of jersey as a quick learning curve given NIFT background and womenswear expertise. Emphasize P&L ownership and speed. Avoid overpromising on SAP.
recruiter_first_impression_target: This candidate has the core merchandising chops and vendor network to manage a category, just needs ramp-up on H&M-specific tools and jersey fabric knowledge.
reasoning: Differentiator is entrepreneurial P&L ownership with strong vendor negotiation and multi-supplier coordination in the Indian context, aligning with the role’s need to drive profitability and manage suppliers. Gaps in OTB, SAP, and specific jersey category create risk, but transferable womenswear skills and proven commercial acumen make this a strong stretch candidate. CAREFUL_PUSH stance acknowledges the fit while being transparent about ramp-up.
